htmlDescription.name: United Kingdom
htmlDescription.decoded:
This we believe was the first UK channel on TGIF, We have no idea who originally set it up but all are welcome to use the channel.

PLEASE NOTE ON THE 16TH JULY 2021 THE LEGACY passw0rd WILL BE TURNED OFF. &

htmlDescription.name: THE HF/MESHTASTIC MASH
htmlDescription.decoded:
Welcome to Talk group 117!

This talk group is focused on **Meshtastic** and **HF-related discussions**.

htmlDescription.name: LUSOFONA (Echolink)
htmlDescription.decoded:
Bem-vindo à Conferência Lusófona da Liga de Amadores de Rádio Transmissões - LART.
Bridge permanente entre TG118 (TGIF) e a Conferência Lusófona (Echolink)
